title: Diamond-Die
description:
Diamond-Die is a baseball dice game where every at bat can turn into glory, disaster, or something pretty goofy. This was made by my wife and I, she handled most of the artwork while I handled the programming. This originally started out as a Uni project around a year ago.  

Build your lineup, roll the dice, chase the target, and try to survive 12 opponents. There are shop items, boss debuffs, mascot races, clubhouse cards, dugout gear, seventh inning stretch chaos, and questionable choices from the cheater prompt that can land you in hot water or boost your in-game ego.

It is part baseball, part dice game, part roguelite shop run, and part arcade nonsense. Hit home runs, steal momentum, buy weird upgrades, gamble your coins, and try to make it all the way to the final boss, Diamond Dawg. It is easy to learn, and built for quick runs that can spiral into absolute ballpark madness. The rules of the game follow baseball but not super closely, enough for even hardcore fans to be drawn in!

I will be providing some free updates throughout the year. The final batch of updates will be by the end of year (2026) with support for Windows, Mac, & Linux. I was inspired by one of my favorite dice games Deadball during uni to make this game! Thank you for the support, take care!

• Steam Achievements (In the works)

• Pitcher Mode (1st)

• Franchise Mode (2nd)

• Story Mode (3rd)
description_short: Diamond-Die is a baseball dice game where every at bat can turn into glory, disaster, or something pretty goofy.
